title: EN ↔ BN Translation
desc: Development-sector, governance, and policy translation with strong domain fluency. Registered World Bank vendor; regular translator for The Business Standard source documents and NGO reports.
includes: Reports, briefs, and policy documents (EN ⇄ BN)
Source statements, testimony transcripts, and verified quotes

title: SOP & Motivation Letter Editing
desc: Structural and line-level editing of graduate application documents. Informed by 500+ student consultations at SI-UK Bangladesh and ongoing independent advising for applicants to the UK, EU, and North American universities.
includes: Programme-specific fit audit (Oxford, LSE, Harvard, Ivy+, Russell Group)

title: Education Consulting
desc: One-on-one advising on undergraduate and postgraduate applications — programme shortlisting, profile strategy, scholarship positioning, and timeline planning.
includes: Scholarship mapping (Chevening, Clarendon, Commonwealth, DAAD, Fulbright, etc.)

title: Academic Writing Coaching
desc: Coaching for undergraduate and early-graduate writers on academic structure, argumentation, and the fossilised errors that most often undercut South Asian applicants to Western programmes.
